# Mostafa Ead — Tech Lead

> Tech Lead based in Cairo, Egypt. Nine years in production software, seven
> leading cross-platform mobile work in Flutter — consumer, fintech, IoT, and
> edtech apps in global app stores. Recently expanded into AI agent systems
> and RAG architectures (AWS Certified ML — Specialty). Open to roles.

Source of truth for this content lives in `src/data/site.ts` and `src/data/projects.ts` in the repository at https://github.com/darssh26/portfolio.

## Profile

- [Portfolio site](https://darssh26.github.io/portfolio/): the canonical home page
- [CV (PDF)](https://darssh26.github.io/portfolio/cv.pdf): full résumé
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mostafa-ead-b403b51a2/): work history and recommendations
- [GitHub](https://github.com/darssh26): open-source work
- Email: dev.mostafa.ead@gmail.com

## Stack

Flutter, Dart, TypeScript, Node.js, Python. AWS Certified Machine Learning — Specialty.

## Projects

### Leadership & production delivery

- **ShopX** — led mobile team to ship global shopping app across stores. [iOS](https://apps.apple.com/eg/app/shopx-global-shopping/id1661978394) · [Android](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.shopxco.shopx)
- **Tank Payments** — financial account product purpose-built for freight carriers. [iOS](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/tank-payments/id6467872756)
- **BizBuradayız** — roadside-assistance platform. [iOS](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/bizburaday%C4%B1z/id6468649321)

### IoT & smart devices

- **Thkey** — smart access-control app. [iOS](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/thkey/id6740452628) · [Android](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.meshkati.thkey)
- **Rack** — retail-store IoT automation. [iOS](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/rack/id6503873387?platform=iphone) · [Android](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.meshkati.rack)

### EdTech & consumer

- **MiSK** — Arabic learning for non-native children. [iOS](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/misk/id1548990632) · [Android](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.miskarabic.MiSK1)
- **Dalilak** — city-information app. [iOS](https://apps.apple.com/eg/app/%D8%AF%D9%84%D9%8A%D9%84%D9%83-dalilak/id6477162339) · [Android](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=app.dalilak.dalilak)
- **My Thinking Skills** — educational app for thinking-skill development. [Android](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.alcegypt.maryam)
- **Skills** — children's skill-development app. [Android](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.alcegypt.skills)
- **Ad3ia** — Arabic e-book reader. [Android](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.alcegypt.ad3ia)
- **Wisdom** — interactive Arabic-learning activities. [Android](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.alcegypt.wisdom_sample)

### Open source & capstone

- **AWS ML Exam Practice** — community study tool for AWS ML Specialty candidates. [GitHub](https://github.com/darssh26/aws-ml-exam)
- **AI Coder** — Computer Science Diploma capstone project. [GitHub](https://github.com/darssh26/AI-Coder)
